drl:
rule "R0"
when
    $p0_0 : T0()
    T0(f1 >= "b", f3 == true, $b0_1_0 : f1)
    T0(f1 != $b0_1_0)
then
    insert(new T1($p0_0.getF1(), true));
    insert(new T1("beta", true));
end
rule "R1"
no-loop
when
    T0(f2 in (6, 0, 11), f1 in ("beta", "b"), f0 >= 5.5 && f0 <= 2.5, $b1_0_0 : f2)
    T0(f0 > -3.0 && f0 < 2.5, f0 > $b1_0_0, $b1_1_0 : f0)
    accumulate( T1(f1 == true, f1 != false); $a1_2 : count() )
then
end
rule "R2"
salience -8
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f1 not in ("b", ""), f3 not in (true), $b2_0_0 : f3, $b2_0_1 : f0)
then
    insert(new T1($p2_0.getF1(), true));
    insert(new T1($p2_0.getF1(), false));
end
rule "R3"
no-loop
when
    T1(f1 == true, f0 > "a", $b3_0_0 : f0, $b3_0_1 : f1)
    $p3_1 : T1(f1 != true, f0 in ("", ""), f1 != $b3_0_1, $b3_1_0 : f1, $b3_1_1 : f1)
then
    delete($p3_1);
end
rule "R4"
agenda-group "gb"
when
    (or (and T0() T0(f1 >= "b", f3 == true, $b4_1_0 : f1) T0(f1 != $b4_1_0) T1(f1 == false, $b4_3_0 : f1, $b4_3_1 : f0)) (and T0() T0(f1 >= "b", f3 == true, $b4_1_0 : f1) T0(f1 != $b4_1_0) T1(f1 == false, $b4_3_0 : f1, $b4_3_1 : f0)) (and T0() T0(f1 >= "b", f1 matches "ab*", $b4_1_0 : f1) T0(f1 != $b4_1_0) T1(f0 > "alpha", $b4_3_0 : f1, $b4_3_1 : f0)))
then
end
query Q0(boolean $qa0_0, String $qa0_1, boolean $qa0_2)
    ( $qp0_0 : T1(f1 == $qa0_0, f0 == $qa0_1) )
    or
    ( $qp0_1 : T1(f1 == $qa0_2, $qb0_0 : f1, $qb0_1 : f1) and $qp0_2 : T1(f0 == $qa0_1, f1 != true, $qb0_2 : f0, $qb0_3 : f1) )
end

query TCr(String $a, String $b)
    ( RelR($a, $b;) )
    or
    ( RelR($m, $b;) and TCr($a, $m;) and MarkR(node == $m) )
end

query TWr(String $w)
    TCr($w, "v4";)
end

rule QR0 salience 7
when
    T0(f1 >= "beta", $qr0_b0 : f2)
    ?Q0(false, $qr0_x0, false;)
    ?TCr($qr0_x1, $qr0_x2;)
    T1(f0 == $qr0_x0)
then
    insert(new QOut(1, $qr0_b0, $qr0_b0, "", true));
end
